target_population: Eligible non-test registered users with a complete seven-day observation window.
inclusion_mechanism: Users enter the frame through analytics export coverage; low-end Android devices are undercovered.
response_mechanism: Outcome fields may be missing after selection; long onboarding and low-end devices have lower response probability.
known_limitations: Coverage warnings do not prove the direction of metric bias without a model.
Response-rate warnings show where an estimate needs adjustment or sensitivity analysis.
This lesson audits sample mechanics; confidence intervals start in 09/05.
